android.summary: Monitor Bitaxe Bitcoin miners from anywhere. Biometrics, charts, Pro history.

ios.releaseNotes: v1.2.2 — Two fixes bundled. (1) Rebuilt the QR scanner using AVFoundation (Apple's native camera framework) — the "BarcodeScanner not implemented on iOS" error from v1.2 is fixed. (2) Mobile WebSocket now auto-reconnects with exponential backoff when the connection drops (network blip, app backgrounded, brief desktop disconnect). The app no longer requires force-close + reopen to recover from a transient disconnect.
